title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: selinux-policy bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for selinux-policy is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian

fixes.description: Confine the tuned-ppd service
afterburn.service fails in RHEL-10.0 (RHCOS) with SELinux enabled
[rhel-10] the switcheroo-control service runs under unconfined_service_t label
[rhel-10] SELinux prevents chronyc from talking to chronyd-restricted via socket
[rhel-10] avc: denied { setattr } for pid=6225 comm=cifs.idmap scontext=system_u:system_r:cifs_helper_t:s0 tcontext=system_u:system_r:kernel_t:s0 tclass=key permissive=0
[rhel-10] the varnish service triggers SELinux denials
AVC denials happen when start a guest with disk that has data file and backing file
[rhel-10] SELinux denials appear when NetworkManager executes ping
[rhel-10] 'journalctl -M tux' fails due to AVC denied
[rhel-10] AVC generated by "systemd-user-runtime-dir stop 0" service when having directories with various contexts
bootupctl failed as missing rules
Selinux: ModemManager AVCs on RHEL10
bootupctl adopt failed
var/etc as selinux equivalent path to /etc
[rhel-10] SELinux denies NetworkManager to kill nft/iptables process
Ship EPEL related SELinux modules as selinux-policy-epel-* packages
[rhel-10] tlog lock files can't be created by confined SELinux users
Start vm with bridge type interface connected to ovs bridge triggers avc denied error
Resolve build gating failure due to RHEL 10 mass rebuild [mptcpd]
New policy to allow RHCS using cracklib-check
[rhel-10] avc: denied { setattr } for pid=12313 comm=key.dns_resolve scontext=system_u:system_r:keyutils_dns_resolver_t:s0 tcontext=system_u:system_r:kernel_t:s0 tclass=key permissive=0
[hostdev]AVC denied when hotplugging/unplugging vHBA device to/from vm
AVC denied when hotplugging scsi lun to vm
[RHEL-10.1] New SELinux domain required for TDX confidential virtualization "qgs" daemon
selinux prevents daemon-stop(daemon-init) from create(unlink) to vm.xml.once
SELinux denies libvirt persistence of mediated device definitions
selinux-policy denies systemd_cryptsetup_generator_t
Rebase selinux-policy to the newest one available in Fedora 42
AVC denials for "allow virtqemud_t insights_core_t:dir search; allow virtqemud_t insights_core_t:file { open read };"
Resolve minor issues after selinux-policy rebase
Failed to start vm with encrypted vtpm on latest selinux-policy
AVC denials appear when starting/destroying a VM with hostdev CD/DVD
SELinux denials happen when cloning a VM with nvram
SELinux denials happen when destroying a domain with PCI hostdev
SELinux prevents nfs-server-generator from writing to /run/systemd/generator/ directory
Hotplug hostdev device will trigger avc denied error
AVC denied error when start vm with interface set with "<port isolated='yes'/>"
AVC denied error when try to allocate hugepages by "# virsh allocpages"
AVC denied error when macTableManager is set to libvirt in network's setting
SELinux prevents "alsactl monitor" command from watching /dev/snd/
[rhel-10] SELinux prevents the rpc-virtqemud from starting a VM which uses nbdkit
Revert selinux-policy rules to back insights-core policy module [rhel-10]

full_text:
An update for selinux-policy is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
